nativeRange.habitat: Shallow reef slopes and rocky subtidal zones in the photic zone, typically 0–30 m depth

decorPreferences: Rock attachment via wedging between rocks
Zip-tie or fishing line to rockwork
Superglue to frag plug as last resort — must not be buried in sand

avoidWith: herbivorous fish that may graze heavily on macroalgae (e.g., tangs, rabbitfish)

imageCandidates.notes: Product page image of Neurymenia fraxinifolia from Mosaic Macros listing.

summary: The Red Sawblade is an ornamental red macroalgae with long, distinctively serrated blades that make it a striking display specimen. It attaches best to rockwork rather than resting in sand, and is generally considered intermediate in care.
careNotes: The Red Sawblade (Neurymenia fraxinifolia) is a red macroalgae (Rhodophyta) with elongated, reddish-brown blades bearing a distinctive serrated or sawblade-shaped edge. In an aquarium it works best as a display specimen anchored to rockwork. The most reliable method is simply wedging the base between rocks; zip-tie or fishing line to rockwork also works well. Attaching the base to a frag plug with cyanoacrylate gel is acceptable as a last resort, but is the least preferred approach. IMPORTANT: the base must never be buried or submerged in a sand bed. Like all red algae, Neurymenia fraxinifolia is prone to rapid base melt when its holdfast is covered by sand, which can kill the specimen. Full-spectrum LED lighting is recommended; actinic-only lighting is not sufficient and should be avoided. Flow should be gentle — roughly equivalent to what soft corals prefer — since excessive current can damage the delicate blades. Weekly dosing of iron, iodine, and other trace elements is generally advised to support macroalgae health. Closely related undetermined Neurymenia species forms sold under the name Red Sword are covered in a separate entry [sw-algae-084]. Propagation is by fragmentation; cuttings can be wedged or tied to new rockwork positions.

additional.name: Mosaic Macros — Macroalgae Care Guide
additional.notes: Slice-wide secondary source. Provides authoritative water parameter targets and attachment/placement guidance for all Mosaic-stocked macroalgae, including the sand-bed melt warning for all Rhodophyta.
